name: Cannonbeemon

signature_move.name: Nitro Stinger
signature_move.description: Fires from its super-large caliber laser cannon which can shoot through even heavy armor.

description: A massive Digimon that defends the mysterious "aerial, covert honey base, Royal Base ". Although the aerial base is exposed to danger from all angles, Cannonbeemon is able to cover a vast range with a bombarding barrage fired simultaneously from the gigantic arms containers on its upper body. Also, even if the opponent is heavily armored, it can use its Special Move " Nitro Stinger " to shoot clean through them with its high-caliber laser cannon. Its " Sky Rocket ∞ " fires shots from its containers, which boast an innumerable number of loaded ordnance, and will continue furiously until the coast is completely clear.
